nasb.text: Render the hearts of this people insensitive, Their ears dull, And their eyes dim, Otherwise they might see with their eyes, Hear with their ears, Understand with their hearts, And return and be healed.”

esv.text: Make the heart of this people dull, and their ears heavy, and blind their eyes; lest they see with their eyes, and hear with their ears, and understand with their hearts, and turn and be healed.”

cnv.text: 你要使這子民的心思遲鈍， 耳朵不靈， 眼睛昏暗， 免得他們眼睛看見， 耳朵聽見， 心裡明白， 回轉過來，得到醫治。”

ccb.text: 要让这些人心灵麻木， 耳朵发背， 眼睛昏花， 免得他们眼睛看见， 耳朵听见， 心里明白， 回心转意，就得到医治。”

csbs.text: 让这子民的心麻木， 耳朵发沉，眼睛蒙蔽， 免得他们眼睛看见， 耳朵听见，心里领悟， 回转过来，就得痊愈。”
